meaning: adj.厚颜的,冒失的,粗体字的
examples: The default menu item for a menu is boldfaced.
The words suffixed with a curve are boldfaced in the printing.
Beneath her scrawl, boldfaced words exhorted "Give American Business a Chance!"
Lenovo's still far from a boldfaced name when it comes to Android smartphones.
Every night on Broadway, the great acts of stage are sometimes mangled, sometimes elevated by boldfaced TV and film actors hired because audiences enjoy seeing stars.
